CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2026 Continued To Dec-16-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Petition And Petition To Compel Arbitration **First Appearance Fees Paid**
Off Calendar Apr-20-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Michael Reiser, Esq. 625-285-2600 Reiser Law for Plaintiff.
Jason Skaggs, Esq. 650-262-1986 Skaggs Faucette LLP for Defendant. (In-person)
Court reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR #10619, 415-597-5600, depos@behmke.com

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED.

Mr. Skaggs agrees with TR and reserves time for rebuttal.
Mr. Reiser contets and presents arguments.
Court comments and poses questions. Court and Counsel have a discussion.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendants Verlinvest Beverages S.A., Eric Melloul, Marc-David Bismuth, Clement Pointillart, Ryan Rafeh, and Ken Sadowsky's motion to compel Plaintiffs Kara Goldin and Theodore Goldin to arbitration.

Taken Under Submission.

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR #10619, 415-597-5600, depos@behmke.com, Reported. (302/JMQ)
